session.user: Load and follow the skill instructions in .claude/skills/pr-feedback-classifier/SKILL.md Arguments: --pr 8869 Return the complete JSON output as your final message.
session.assistant: I'll load the skill instructions and execute the PR feedback classifier on PR #8869.
session.tool_result:
1→--- 2→name: pr-feedback-classifier 3→description: > 4→ Fetches and classifies PR review feedback with context isolation. 5→ Returns structured JSON with thread IDs for deterministic resolution. 6→ Use when analyzing PR comments before addressing them. 7→argument-hint: "[--pr <number>] [--include-resolved]" 8→context: fork 9→agent: general-purpose 10→model: sonnet 11→--- 12→ 13→# PR Feedback Classifier 14→ 15→Fetch and classify all PR review feedback for the current branch's PR. 16→ 17→## Arguments 18→ 19→- `--pr <number>`: Target a specific PR by number (default: current branch's PR) 20→- `--include-resolved`: Include resolved threads (for reference) 21→ 22→Check `$ARGUMENTS` for flags. 23→ 24→## Critical Constraints 25→ 26→**DO NOT write Python scripts or any code files.** Classify the data using direct AI reasoning only. Writing code to process JSON is unnecessary and pollutes the filesystem. 27→ 28→## Steps 29→ 30→1. **Fetch PR info and all comments in a single call:**
... [194 lines omitted] ...

## ❌ Audit PR Docs

**Last updated:** 2026-03-06 15:07:29 PT

Found 4 violations across 4 files. Inline comments posted for each.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Patterns Checked
✅ Verbatim code blocks — None found
❌ Inaccurate claims — Found in docs/learned/architecture/health-check-runner-gateway.md:27
❌ Drift risk — Found in docs/learned/architecture/progress-feedback-threading.md:31, docs/learned/cli/commands/pr-prepare.md:22, docs/learned/cli/commands/reconcile.md:27
✅ Duplicative sections — None found

### Doc Verdicts
| File | Verdict | Duplicative % | High Value % | Issues |
|------|---------|---------------|-------------|--------|
| `docs/learned/architecture/health-check-runner-gateway.md` | SIMPLIFY | 20% | 60% | 1 inaccurate |
| `docs/learned/architecture/progress-feedback-threading.md` | KEEP | 15% | 65% | 2 drift risk (private constant names) |
| `docs/learned/architecture/index.md` | KEEP | 0% | 100% | 0 |
| `docs/learned/architecture/tripwires.md` | KEEP | 0% | 100% | 0 |
| `docs/learned/cli/commands/pr-prepare.md` | KEEP | 10% | 65% | 1 drift risk (line count) |
| `docs/learned/cli/commands/reconcile.md` | KEEP | 10% | 65% | 1 drift risk (line counts) |
| `docs/learned/cli/index.md` | KEEP | 0% | 100% | 0 |
| `docs/learned/cli/tripwires.md` | KEEP | 0% | 100% | 0 |
| `docs/learned/planning/incremental-dispatch.md` | KEEP | 5% | 75% | 0 |
| `docs/learned/planning/index.md` | KEEP | 0% | 100% | 0 |
| `docs/learned/planning/tripwires.md` | KEEP | 0% | 100% | 0 |
| `docs/learned/testing/alias-verification-pattern.md` | KEEP | 5% | 75% | 0 |
| `docs/learned/testing/test-file-organization.md` | KEEP | 5% | 70% | 0 |
| `docs/learned/testing/tripwires.md` | KEEP | 0% | 100% | 0 |
| `docs/learned/tripwires-index.md` | KEEP | 0% | 100% | 0 |

### Violations Summary
- `docs/learned/architecture/health-check-runner-gateway.md:27`: HealthCheckRunner ABC claimed to be in `src/erk/core/health_checks/runner.py` but actually lives in `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/core/health_check_runner.py`
- `docs/learned/architecture/progress-feedback-threading.md:31`: Private constant names `_PROGRESS_INTERVAL_SECONDS` and `_PROGRESS_TIMEOUT_SECONDS` referenced — drift risk
- `docs/learned/cli/commands/pr-prepare.md:22`: File line count `(84 lines)` annotation — drift risk
- `docs/learned/cli/commands/reconcile.md:27`: File line counts `(173 lines)` and `(248 lines)` annotations — drift risk

### Files Reviewed
- `docs/learned/architecture/health-check-runner-gateway.md`: 1 violation
